title: sedum sarmentosum var. sarmentosum
intro: Sedum sarmentosum var. sarmentosum, also known as the creeping sedum or dragon's blood, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family, characterized by its sprawling stems and small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Sedum sarmentosum var. sarmentosum include reducing fever, treating wounds and burns, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
